title: L_Ender 's Cataclysm Reimagined 2D
description: Replaces Cataclysm’s bulky 3D interface with a sleek, classic 2D design
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/8EtY9oy.png)

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ[![a](https://i.imgur.com/v35AqUJ.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/waffy/projects) [![s](https://i.imgur.com/552aqbK.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VladVF) [![a](https://i.imgur.com/UQg92oP.png)](https://ko-fi.com/waffyllka)

## About

**Tired of the bulky 3D-style GUI and icons in L\_Ender’s Cataclysm?**  
This resource pack brings them back to a **clean and faithful 2D design**, making the interface smoother, lighter, and more immersive. This resource pack is an add-on version of the base pack and makes all objects 2D.

**P.S.** You are welcome to use this resource pack in your modpacks!

***

## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**❔ Will this pack break my game or the mod?** **✅ Answer:** Absolutely not! This is a standard resource pack that only changes visual models. It is completely safe.

**❔ Do I need OptiFine?** **✅ Answer:** No, it works perfectly without it!

**❔ Will you add models for new items?** **✅ Answer:** Yes! I plan to update the pack and add 2D models for new items introduced in future updates of the mod.
